title: calia formosa
intro: Calia formosa, also known as the Fairy Duster or Bird's Claws, is a flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is said to offer various health benefits, such as relieving digestive issues, reducing anxiety and stress, and supporting immune function. Calia formosa can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions for consumption, and its flowers and leaves are often used in folk remedies to promote overall well-being.
